summary: Tested attendance report filtering by course_id and bimestre for EJA and Anos Finais. All 15 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified: Relatórios tab shows Bimestre dropdown, Ver na Tela and Gerar PDF buttons. Code review confirms correct implementation of course_id and bimestre filtering.
critical_code_review_comments: attendance.py: bimestre parameter correctly added to get_class_attendance_report (line 462)
attendance.py: Date filtering by bimestre period correctly implemented (lines 510-541)
attendance_ext.py: course_id filter correctly added to attendance query (line 332-333)
attendance_ext.py: teacher_query correctly includes course_id for teacher lookup (lines 361-367)
api.js: getClassReport correctly sends bimestre as query param (lines 484-489)
Attendance.js: loadClassReport correctly passes selectedBimestre to API (line 662)
Attendance.js: PDF generation correctly includes course_id and bimestre (line 692)
seed_data_creation: None - database is empty in preview environment
context_for_next_testing_agent: Attendance report filtering by course_id and bimestre fully tested. Backend endpoints accept parameters correctly. Frontend UI shows Bimestre dropdown and passes selectedBimestre to API. Database is empty so full E2E flow with real data cannot be tested.

backend_report_class_endpoint.test: GET /api/attendance/report/class/{class_id} accepts course_id and bimestre params
backend_report_class_endpoint.details: Endpoint returns 404 (no data) not 422 (validation error), confirming params are accepted

backend_pdf_bimestre_endpoint.details: Endpoint accepts course_id as optional query parameter

code_attendance_py_bimestre.test: attendance.py has bimestre parameter and date filtering

frontend_ui_bimestre_dropdown.details: UI screenshot confirms Bimestre dropdown with 1º Bimestre selected

frontend_ui_buttons.test: Ver na Tela and Gerar PDF buttons present
frontend_ui_buttons.details: Both buttons visible in Relatórios tab

notes: WebSocket connection warnings in console are expected in preview environment and do not affect functionality. Database is empty so full E2E testing with real class/student data was not possible.
